That’s according to ABC Sevilla, who report that the Spanish side are fully focused on sealing an exit to Middlesbrough for the striker. arts.ttl: Middlesbrough further bolster attacking options with Aston Villa loan deal completed
arts.sum: Middlesbrough have further boosted their attacking options by adding Aston Villa forward Samuel Iling-Junior on loan. He arrives to further bolster Michael Carrick’s attacking options, having already brought Morgan Whittaker to the club this month too.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough 'trust' in Charlton Athletic and thinking behind Alex Gilbert's loan move
arts.sum: A straight loan with no purchase option, Boro still see a big future for the attacking midfielder and are sending him to Charlton in the hope he continues his development by playing regularly in the second half of the season. Alex Gilbert completed a deadline day Middlesbrough exit as he joined League One side Charlton Athletic on loan until the end of the season.
